speaker_notes:
- Start from the familiar frame, AI helping us build traditional software.
- Explain that the visible harness complexity has distorted how we think about the core idea.

title.value: The way we're thinking about agents is way too narrow.

assumption_1.value: Agents are too complex for normal developers to build

assumption_2.value: Agents are mostly just good at software development

assumption_3.value: The main way to use agents are from within a terminal
